column1: The stock market surged today as investors reacted to strong earnings reports from major tech companies.
Federal Reserve raises interest rates by 25 basis points to combat persistent inflation.
Apple announces record quarterly profits driven by strong iPhone and services revenue.
Oil prices drop sharply amid concerns over global economic slowdown and reduced demand.
Small businesses struggle as rising costs and supply chain disruptions continue to hurt profits.
Lionel Messi scores a hat trick as Inter Miami cruise to a comfortable victory.
India wins the cricket World Cup in a thrilling final against Australia at Ahmedabad.
The Olympics opening ceremony in Paris drew over a billion viewers worldwide.
Manchester United sack their manager following a string of poor results this season.
Serena Williams announces her comeback to professional tennis after two years away.
Scientists develop a new vaccine that shows 95 percent efficacy against malaria in trials.
Study finds that regular exercise reduces the risk of heart disease by up to 40 percent.
WHO declares end to the global health emergency as infection rates fall worldwide.
New cancer treatment using AI-guided surgery shows promising results in clinical trials.
Mental health crisis among teenagers worsens as social media use continues to rise sharply.
Parliament passes landmark climate bill committing to net zero emissions by 2040.
President signs new immigration reform legislation after months of bipartisan negotiations.
Supreme Court rules on controversial election funding case with major political implications.
Prime Minister announces snap general election amid growing pressure from within the party.
United Nations summit on nuclear disarmament ends without agreement among major powers.
NASA launches new Mars rover mission to search for ancient signs of microbial life.
OpenAI releases GPT-5 with significantly improved reasoning and multimodal capabilities.
Self-driving cars cleared for commercial deployment in five additional US states.
Google unveils new quantum computing chip that solves complex problems in seconds.
Cybersecurity breach exposes data of over 50 million users at a major social platform.
Box office smash breaks all records as superhero sequel earns 2 billion dollars worldwide.
Grammy Awards ceremony draws criticism over lack of diversity in major category nominations.
Popular streaming series renewed for three more seasons following massive viewer numbers.
Hollywood actors strike ends after studios agree to new AI usage and pay deal.
Celebrity couple announces divorce after ten years of marriage shocking fans worldwide.
